column1: #mapping_set_description: LLM-generated mappings from the FIX Protocol LinkML schema to the FIX Simple Binary Encoding (SBE) LinkML schema. Coverage is intentionally narrow because SBE is an encoding metamodel; mappings target the encoding-level metaclasses in fix_sbe_common.

column8: SBE SemanticAttributes carries the FIX datatype semantics of an encoded SBE type.
SBE field-level semantic attributes carry the FIX field info onto an SBE encoded field.
Same Presence enum (required, optional, constant) shared between FIX and SBE metamodels.
